etimes"Disgustingly unhygienic": Hyderabad samosa unit raided; reused oil and stale boiled eggs seizedAn illegal samosa factory in Hyderabad was busted by authorities for using spoiled ingredients and unhygienic practices. The unit, operating without licenses, was found to contain stale eggs and reused oil. The proprietor was arrested, and contaminated items worth lakhs were seized, highlighting a serious public health risk.

etimes"Too North Indian": Ex-old Bengaluru resident calls moving to Bellandur the "biggest mistake ever"Bengaluru's tech boom has reshaped its identity, leaving some long-time residents feeling disconnected. A viral Reddit post from an ex-old Bengaluru local highlights the cultural shift in areas like Bellandur, where the convenience of office commutes is overshadowed by a perceived loss of local festivals and belonging. This sentiment resonates with many, sparking conversations about the city's evolving character.
